name: Sediment Pore Water Geochemistry from Station M186_50-1GC, Mid-Atlantic Ridge
description: Geochemical analysis of sediment pore water samples collected at station M186_50-1GC on the Mid-Atlantic Ridge. The dataset includes concentrations of major ions (Cl-, SO4 2-, Na, Mg, K, Ca, Sr, B, Li, Br), nutrients (NO3, NO2, NH4, PO4), and trace metals (Mn, Fe, Si, Ba) measured at specific sediment depths. Data includes spatial coordinates, elevation, and sampling timestamps from December 2022.
